revision.comment: test
1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Template" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category::" to "Category:"
Copying from [[Category:Refreshing imports]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[CAtegory:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "qq"
Text replacement - "redirects 1-26" to ""
Copying from [[Category:S needing substitution checking]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 7 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Over-explained}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Over-explained | text = over-explained | title = This claim may feature over-explanation | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles needing cleanup }}<!--{{Over-explained}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <templatedata> { "params": { "date": {} } } </templatedata></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All pages needing cleanup]] [[Category:refreshing ]] [[Category:Over-explained]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOver-explained]] [[CAtegory:qq]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOver-explained]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Over-explained]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
